name: FIRST REAL ESTATE INVESTMENT TRUST OF NEW JERSEY, INC.
summary: First Real Estate Investment Trust of New Jersey, Inc. (FREIT) is a Maryland corporation organized as a REIT that acquires, develops, constructs, and holds income-producing real estate for long-term investment. Its portfolio includes six multi-family apartment buildings (792 units), five commercial properties (~589,000 sq ft leasable space), and undeveloped land parcels, located in New Jersey and New York. Properties include residential apartment communities and multi/single-tenanted commercial shopping centers.

products.name: Residential Apartment Communities
products.description: Multi-family apartment complexes totaling 792 units across New Jersey and New York.

products.name: Commercial Properties
products.description: Shopping centers and multi/single-tenant commercial spaces totaling approximately 589,000 square feet of leasable space.

products.name: Undeveloped Land
products.description: Approximately 7.37 acres of unimproved land parcels in New Jersey held for investment.

partnerships.description: Managing agent for FREIT; employees and affiliates participate in joint venture property ownership.
Lender for Westwood Plaza shopping center mortgage; extended and modified loan terms multiple times.
Lender for Middletown, New York apartment building mortgage; extended loan to December 15, 2027.
Lender for Preakness Shopping Center mortgage; providing extensions while modification discussions ongoing.
